title: Above Average Salary
description: Find all employees whose salary is above the company-wide average salary. Return their name and salary.
reference_query: SELECT name, salary FROM employees WHERE salary > (SELECT AVG(salary) FROM employees)
hints: A subquery inside WHERE can return a single value to compare against.
Use (SELECT AVG(salary) FROM employees) to compute the average inside your query.
The outer query then filters rows where salary exceeds that average.
explanation: A scalar subquery returns a single value and can be used anywhere an expression is valid — including in a WHERE clause comparison.
